summary: Russia launched ballistic missile attacks on Zaporizhzhia, injuring at least six people, while Ukrainian forces continue repatriating captured soldiers from Russian captivity. A MiG-31K interceptor capable of carrying Kh-47M2 Kinzhal hypersonic missiles took off from Savastleyka airfield, prompting nationwide missile threat alerts across Ukraine. Multiple waves of attack drones targeted northern, eastern, and southern regions of Ukraine, with threats reported toward Chernihiv, Kharkiv, Poltava, Odesa, and Zaporizhzhia oblasts.
key_points: Russian forces attacked Zaporizhzhia with ballistic missiles, injuring at least six people. (Source: @UkraineNow/82190)
A MiG-31K carrying Kh-47M2 Kinzhal hypersonic missiles took off from Savastleyka airfield, triggering a nationwide missile threat alert across Ukraine. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68081)
Ukraine freed 160 military personnel from Russian captivity, all held since 2022, including defenders of Mariupol and Azovstal. (Source: @UkraineNow/82195)

Multiple attack drone groups were detected heading toward Chernihiv, Kharkiv, Poltava, Odesa (Zatoka), and Zaporizhzhia from various directions including Belgorod Oblast, Luhansk Oblast, and the Black Sea. (Source: @kpszsu/66475)

Macron stated the US no longer wants to be a neutral mediator and now supports Ukraine's territorial integrity while advocating increased aid and stronger sanctions against Russia. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31174)
The European Commission proposed revoking EU asylum for newly arrived Ukrainians of mobilization age and launched a voluntary return program. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31185)

Hackers PalachPro and NoName057(16) claimed Ukrainian Armed Forces lost 2.4 million personnel since the start of the SMO, with 400,000 deaths in the first six months of 2026. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31184)
Lithuania raised nine million euros to provide solar panels for schools and hospitals in Ukraine. (Source: @UkraineNow/82208)

sections.executive_summary: Russia launched ballistic missile attacks on Zaporizhzhia, injuring at least six people, while a MiG-31K capable of delivering Kh-47M2 Kinzhal hypersonic missiles took off from Savastleyka airfield, triggering nationwide missile alerts. Multiple waves of attack drones were tracked heading toward Chernihiv, Kharkiv, Poltava, Odesa, and Zaporizhzhia oblasts from directions including Belgorod Oblast, Luhansk Oblast, and the Black Sea. Ukraine simultaneously freed 160 military personnel from Russian captivity, all held since 2022, as President Zelensky stated over 9,500 people have been returned since the start of the full-scale war.

points: Ukraine freed 160 military personnel from Russian captivity in a prisoner exchange; all had been held since 2022. The freed soldiers included members of the Armed Forces of Ukraine, State Special Transport Service, National Guard, and Border Guards who defended Mariupol, Azovstal, and fought on the Donetsk, Luhansk, Kharkiv, Zaporizhzhia, Kyiv, Chernihiv, and Sumy fronts. (Source: @UkraineNow/82195)

President Zelensky stated that over 9,500 people have been returned from Russian captivity since the start of the full-scale war, with 1,596 repatriated this year alone. He confirmed that exchanges are ongoing and further stages are expected. (Source: @UkraineNow/82211)

In Gurovka near Krivoy Rog, local residents blocked a TCC (military commissariat) van after tractor drivers and combine operators were taken directly from the fields for mobilization. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31179)

The Skala assault regiment was reported to have subjected recruits to abuse including being doused with water and urine outdoors during winter, and escapees were allegedly tied to ATVs and dragged along the ground. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31170)
An air raid alert was declared in Kyiv at 19:09 on June 26, 2026. (Source: @eRadarrua/98282)
Lithuania raised nine million euros to supply solar panels for Ukrainian schools and hospitals, announced at the Ukraine Recovery Conference in Gdansk. (Source: @UkraineNow/82208)

Ukrainian heavyweight boxer Oleksandr Usyk relinquished all his championship titles (WBA, WBC, IBF) in the heavyweight division, stating it was a conscious decision to open new opportunities. (Source: @UkraineNow/82210)
Russian forces attacked Zaporizhzhia with ballistic missiles, injuring at least six people. (Source: @UkraineNow/82190)

A Russian MiG-31K interceptor capable of carrying the Kh-47M2 Kinzhal hypersonic missile took off from Savastleyka airfield, prompting missile threat alerts across Ukraine. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68081)
There was a threat of Iskander-M or S-300 ballistic missile launches from Kursk Oblast toward Myrhorod. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68075)
A Russian aircraft carrying fighters returning from Ukrainian captivity landed in the Moscow region (Podmoskovye). (Source: @tass_agency/382580)
The Russian State Duma introduced fines of up to 700,000 rubles for user authorization through foreign services, including foreign email. (Source: @tass_agency/382560)

Russian Ambassador to the Valdai Club, Trofimov, stated that the concept of European security has 'gone bankrupt and crumbled' and that the West does not intend to lift sanctions against Russia in the medium or long term. (Source: @tass_agency/382596)
Russia's Sports Federation approved the participation of Russian weightlifters under 20 years old in international tournaments with the national flag and anthem. (Source: @tass_agency/382563)
A reactive drone from Donetsk Oblast was tracked heading toward southern Kharkiv Oblast, with a course set for Lozova. (Source: @kpszsu/66473)
A group of drones from Luhansk Oblast was detected heading toward Kharkiv Oblast, course set for Lozova. (Source: @kpszsu/66516)
Attack drones were detected on the border of Chernihiv and Sumy oblasts heading toward Poltavshchyna. (Source: @kpszsu/66525)
A threat of strike drones targeting Chernihiv, Sumy, Kharkiv, and Zaporizhzhia oblasts was reported. (Source: @kpszsu/66530)
A drone was detected near Slavutich heading toward the Kyiv Reservoir. (Source: @eRadarrua/98273)
A drone was detected near Slavutich in Chernihiv Oblast. (Source: @eRadarrua/98274)
A drone was detected near Kropyvnytskyi in the Kyiv region. (Source: @eRadarrua/98274)
A group of drones from Belgorod Oblast, Russian Federation, was detected heading toward northern Kharkiv Oblast, with a course set for Bohodukhiv. (Source: @kpszsu/66475)
A group of drones approaching Chernihiv from the north was detected. (Source: @kpszsu/66519)
Drones approaching Kharkiv from the north were detected. (Source: @kpszsu/66519)
Three drones were detected near Slavutich heading toward the Kyiv Reservoir. (Source: @eRadarrua/98273)
One drone was detected near Kropyvnytskyi in the Kyiv region. (Source: @eRadarrua/98274)
One drone was detected near Slavutich in Chernihiv Oblast. (Source: @eRadarrua/98274)
An air raid alert was declared in Kyiv at 19:09 on June 26, 2026. (Source: @eRadarrua/98282)
Russian forces attacked Zaporizhzhia with ballistic missiles, injuring at least six people. (Source: @UkraineNow/82190)
Attack drones were detected heading toward Zaporizhzhia from the east and south. (Source: @kpszsu/66526)
A drone from the Black Sea was detected heading toward Odesa Oblast, with a course set for Zatoka. (Source: @kpszsu/66504)
A threat of strike drones targeting Zaporizhzhia Oblast was reported. (Source: @kpszsu/66530)
A drone was detected near Ripti in Sumy Oblast, with a KAB (corrected aerial bomb) heading toward Zaporizhzhia Oblast (Mala Katerynivka). (Source: @eRadarrua/98319)
A drone was detected heading toward Yavorntsi in Dnipropetrovsk Oblast from the south, and a reconnaissance drone (Kulava) was detected near Poltavshchyna heading south. (Source: @eRadarrua/98316)
An alert was declared in Poltavshchyna due to drones near Sribne. (Source: @eRadarrua/98301)

A MiG-31K interceptor carrying the Kh-47M2 Kinzhal hypersonic missile took off from Savastleyka airfield, triggering a nationwide missile threat alert across all of Ukraine. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68081)
A nationwide missile danger alert was declared across all of Ukraine following the MiG-31K takeoff. (Source: @kpszsu/66506)
There was a threat of Iskander-M or S-300 ballistic missile launches from Kursk Oblast toward Myrhorod. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68075)
A ballistic missile threat toward Myrhorod was reported. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68077)
An air raid alert was declared in Kyiv at 19:09 on June 26, 2026. (Source: @eRadarrua/98282)
Ukraine's HUR MOU issued an urgent fundraising appeal for three fiber-optic FPV drones capable of destroying Russian equipment en route to Crimea or the front line. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68079)
A Russian Il-22 aircraft was reportedly shot down, though this claim requires further verification from available sources.

key_developments: A MiG-31K carrying Kh-47M2 Kinzhal hypersonic missiles took off from Savastleyka airfield, triggering a nationwide missile threat alert across all of Ukraine. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68081)
Russian forces attacked Zaporizhzhia with ballistic missiles, injuring at least six people. (Source: @UkraineNow/82190)

Multiple attack drone groups were detected heading toward Chernihiv, Kharkiv, Poltava, Odesa (Zatoka), and Zaporizhzhia from Belgorod Oblast, Luhansk Oblast, and the Black Sea. (Source: @kpszsu/66475)
Ukraine freed 160 military personnel from Russian captivity, all held since 2022, including defenders of Mariupol and Azovstal. (Source: @UkraineNow/82195)

Macron stated the US no longer wants to be a neutral mediator and now supports Ukraine's territorial integrity while advocating increased aid and stronger sanctions against Russia. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31174)
The European Commission proposed revoking EU asylum for newly arrived Ukrainians of mobilization age and launched a voluntary return program. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31185)

Hackers PalachPro and NoName057(16) claimed Ukrainian Armed Forces lost 2.4 million personnel since the start of the SMO, with 400,000 deaths in the first six months of 2026. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31184)
sections.threat_assessment: The operational environment is significantly escalating. The MiG-31K Kinzhal launch from Savastleyka represents a high-end hypersonic strike threat that Ukrainian air defenses reportedly cannot intercept in most regions. Combined with multiple simultaneous drone attack vectors from Belgorod Oblast, Luhansk Oblast, Donetsk Oblast, and the Black Sea targeting Chernihiv, Kharkiv, Poltava, Odesa, and Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine's air defense network faces a complex multi-axis saturation threat. The ballistic missile strike on Zaporizhzhia confirms Russia's continued willingness to employ long-range precision fires against civilian areas.
sections.regional_response: The European Commission proposed revoking EU asylum for newly arrived Ukrainians of mobilization age, signaling a shift in European policy that may pressure Ukraine to mobilize diaspora populations. Lithuania raised nine million euros for solar panels for Ukrainian schools and hospitals, demonstrating continued European humanitarian support. Macron indicated a shift in US policy away from neutrality toward explicit support for Ukraine's territorial integrity, increased aid, and stronger sanctions against Russia. Three Polish politicians declined Ukrainian awards in solidarity with victims' families of the Volyn massacre, reflecting ongoing historical tensions.
sections.intelligence_notes: The hacker groups PalachPro and NoName057(16) claimed to have accessed Ukrainian General Staff databases, Trans-Caucasian Center for Combating Corruption records, Ukrainian medical organizations, and morgue data to compile casualty figures of 2.4 million Ukrainian losses. These figures, if verified, would represent unprecedented casualties. The claim that approximately 5,000 foreign mercenaries died, with most from Brazil and Argentina aged 20-23, suggests significant foreign volunteer involvement. Russia's State Duma introduced fines up to 700,000 rubles for using foreign digital services, indicating Moscow's continued push toward digital sovereignty and information control.
